data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits user decision-overload by simplifying choices on each page.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes visual hierarchy and grouping to enhance readability.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs with target acquisition speed in mind, ensuring clickable elements are accessible.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Breaks complex information into chunks to aid user memory retention.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related items using bounding boxes and visual containers.
